prompt: Call fs.write_text to create or overwrite the file "inference-smoke/original.txt" with the exact content "line one".
Call fs.append_text to append the exact text "`nline two" to the file "inference-smoke/original.txt".
Call fs.read_file to read the file "inference-smoke/original.txt" and return the exact contents.
Call fs.copy_path to copy "inference-smoke/original.txt" to "inference-smoke/copy.txt" with overwrite set to true.
Call fs.move_path to move "inference-smoke/copy.txt" to "inference-smoke/moved.txt" with overwrite set to true.
Call shell.exec to run pwsh with args ["-NoLogo","-NoProfile","-Command","Get-Content -Raw inference-smoke/moved.txt"] and timeoutSeconds 30.
Call shell.exec with the bare command line "git --version" and omit args. Set timeoutSeconds to 30.
Call fs.delete_path to delete the directory "inference-smoke" recursively.
